parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'error', error: $('Validate Input').first().json.error, missing_fields: $('Validate Input').first().json.missing_fields || [] }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT id FROM clients WHERE email = $1 LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO clients (name, email, phone) VALUES ($1, $2, $3) RETURNING id

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Check Client Exists').first().json.client_name, $('Check Client Exists').first().json.client_email, $('Check Client Exists').first().json.client_phone] }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO projects (client_id, name, project_type, budget_target, budget_flexible, location_address, location_city, location_province, property_type, property_area_m2, urgency, current_phase, status, metadata) VALUES ($1::uuid, $2, $3, $4::numeric, $5::boolean, $6, $7, $8, $9, $10::numeric, $11, 'intake', 'active', $12::jsonb) RETURNING id, name
INSERT INTO activity_log (project_id, agent_name, action, status, output_summary) VALUES ($1::uuid, 'init_new_project', 'project_created', 'success', $2)

value.subject: Nuevo proyecto creado
value.message: =Se ha creado el proyecto **{{ $('Create Project').first().json.name }}**. El sistema comenzará a procesar el briefing automáticamente. Sube la documentación inicial (fotos, planos, notas) a la carpeta de Drive del proyecto.
